calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: DONALD J. SULLIVAN, Clerk: S. Vantree CSR: S. Wong # 11288.
Petitioners CHANTANA KLAISUMRID, mother and PRAPAS AROONCHAIPLROM, father was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor NATSHAPON AROONCHAIP.

Petitioners was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father signs petition for name change in open court.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to DANAH NATSHAPOL AROONCHAIPIROM.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
